jsonLd.title: Zomato is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Zomato family as a E-commerce Executive in Surat. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Zomato:
Zomato is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zomato!
